title: thelypteris rufa
intro: Thelypteris rufa, also known as the Rufous Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. The Rufous Lady Fern has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris rufa include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, with its leaves being used fresh or dried for various medicinal applications.
